<> $text = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $text = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", "http://yahoo.com/abc1", $text); echo $text; This code replaces the URL "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1" with "http://yahoo.com/abc1" in the given string. The replacement works for any occurrence of the URL in the string. Here is a palindrome: **"A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"**
